mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_clips (code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, folder, created_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{title}, #{skill}, #{level}, #{topic}, #{examType}, #{scriptText}, #{storageKey}, #{source}, #{folder}, now()) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, skill = EXCLUDED.skill, level = EXCLUDED.level, topic = EXCLUDED.topic, exam_type = EXCLUDED.exam_type, script_text = EXCLUDED.script_text, storage_key = EXCLUDED.storage_key, source = EXCLUDED.source, folder = EXCLUDED.folder
mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, folder, created_at FROM dictation_clips WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, folder, created_at FROM dictation_clips WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT skill FROM dictation_clips WHERE skill IS NOT NULL ORDER BY skill
SELECT DISTINCT level FROM dictation_clips WHERE level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY level
SELECT DISTINCT topic FROM dictation_clips WHERE topic IS NOT NULL ORDER BY topic
SELECT DISTINCT exam_type FROM dictation_clips WHERE exam_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY exam_type
SELECT folder AS folder, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dictation_clips GROUP BY folder ORDER BY folder
SELECT id, code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, folder, created_at FROM dictation_clips WHERE folder = #{folder} ORDER BY code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_clip_sentences (clip_id, seq, text, created_at) VALUES (#{clipId}, #{seq}, #{text}, now()) ON CONFLICT (clip_id, seq) DO UPDATE SET text = EXCLUDED.text
mapper.select: SELECT id, clip_id, seq, text, start_ms, end_ms, translation, created_at FROM dictation_clip_sentences WHERE clip_id = #{clipId} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_attempts (clip_id, practice_item_id, user_id, user_transcript, accuracy, wer, created_at) VALUES (#{clipId}, #{practiceItemId}, #{userId}, #{userTranscript}, #{accuracy}, #{wer}, now())

INSERT INTO dictation_misses (attempt_id, user_id, clip_id, expected_word, actual_word, tag, created_at) VALUES
(#{miss.attemptId}, #{miss.userId}, #{miss.clipId}, #{miss.expectedWord}, #{miss.actualWord}, #{miss.tag}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE dictation_attempts SET ai_suggestions = #{aiSuggestions} WHERE id = #{attemptId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM dictation_misses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND lower(expected_word) = lower(#{word})

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.clip_id AS clip_id, c.title AS title, c.skill AS skill, c.level AS level, c.exam_type AS exam_type, a.accuracy AS accuracy, a.wer AS wer, a.created_at AS created_at, CASE WHEN a.clip_id IS NOT NULL THEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.user_id, a.clip_id ORDER BY a.created_at ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) END AS attempt_count FROM dictation_attempts a LEFT JOIN dictation_clips c ON c.id = a.clip_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.clip_id AS clip_id, a.practice_item_id AS practice_item_id, COALESCE(c.title, 'AI practice') AS title, c.skill AS skill, c.level AS level, c.exam_type AS exam_type, COALESCE(c.script_text, p.sentence_text) AS reference_text, a.user_transcript AS user_transcript, a.accuracy AS accuracy, a.wer AS wer, a.ai_suggestions AS ai_suggestions, a.created_at AS created_at FROM dictation_attempts a LEFT JOIN dictation_clips c ON c.id = a.clip_id LEFT JOIN dictation_practice_items p ON p.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.id = #{attemptId} AND a.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, attempt_id, user_id, clip_id, expected_word, actual_word, tag, created_at FROM dictation_misses WHERE attempt_id = #{attemptId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_practice_items (user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, level, exam_type, topic, translation_text, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sentenceText}, #{source}, #{storageKey}, #{level}, #{examType}, #{topic}, #{translationText}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, level, exam_type, topic, translation_text, created_at FROM dictation_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, level, exam_type, topic, translation_text, created_at FROM dictation_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND storage_key IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE dictation_practice_items SET storage_key = #{storageKey} WHERE id = #{practiceItemId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dictation_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND storage_key IS NULL
